name: SABChatLayout
description: SAB-branded chat surface: a welcome screen (logo + starter prompts) on an empty conversation, giving way to a bottom-anchored transcript with assistant avatars + a thinking indicator, and a pill composer.
whenToUse: The default branded chat surface. For a two-column content split use KeyService.
